metadata.description: This is coming from the parameter File under Parameters
This is coming from the parameter File under Parameters

emailReceivers.comment: This is a place holder for ICM implementation
emailReceivers.name: Test

alerts.name: High-CPU
alerts.description: Detected VM/s that running high CPU consumption

criteriaDetails.query: Perf | where ObjectName == "Processor" and CounterName == "% Processor Time" | summarize AggregatedValue = avg(CounterValue) by bin(TimeGenerated, 10m), Computer | sort by TimeGenerated desc | where AggregatedValue > 90

alerts.name: High-Memory-Usage
alerts.description: Detected VM/s with High Memory Usage

criteriaDetails.query:
Perf
| where ObjectName == "Memory" 
| where CounterName == "Available MBytes" 
| summarize AggregatedValue = avg(CounterValue) by bin(TimeGenerated, 30m), Computer 
| sort by TimeGenerated desc 
| where AggregatedValue < 512

alerts.name: Server-Ping-Test-Failure
alerts.description: Heartbeat of VM/s has not been reported

criteriaDetails.query:
Heartbeat
| where Computer in (['GetAllComputers'])

alerts.name: 1 or More Documents Not Published Due to ThreatScanAborted Over the Last 15 Minutes
alerts.description:
This rule will fire when the below query returns 1 or more rows.  This indicates that Documents uploaded through Invoice UI have not been published because the maximum retries have elapsed (> 10) in trying to get a Safe designation from Sonar DaaS. Currently there is no action for this alert and the alert notification will not go to IcM.

customEvents
| where name == "ThreatScanAborted" and timestamp > ago(15m)

criteriaDetails.query:
customEvents
| where name == "ThreatScanAborted" and timestamp > ago(15m)

alerts.name: 1 or More Sonar Submissions Found Unsafe Over Last 15 Minutes
alerts.description:
This alert will fire when 1 or more rows are returned from the below query indicating that a Document uploaded through Invoice UI has been designated as Unsafe/Bad from Sonar DaaS.  This is just informational to determine how often this happens. 

customEvents
| where name == "ThreatScanningCompletedEventV1" and customDimensions.ThreatScanResult == "Unsafe" and timestamp > ago(15m)

criteriaDetails.query:
customEvents
| where name == "ThreatScanningCompletedEventV1" and customDimensions.ThreatScanResult == "Unsafe" and timestamp > ago(15m)

alerts.name: 100 Percent DMS Dependency Failures over last 15 Minutes
alerts.description:
This alert will fire when the below query returns 100, indicating that all Dependency events are success == false over the last 15 minutes. This means that Invoice DMSUpload Service is not able to upload Soft Copy invoices to DMS Web Service. Please see https://microsoftit.visualstudio.com/OneITVSO/_workitems/edit/9252240 for more information about this alert.

dependencies
| where customDimensions.Origin == "DMSUploadService" and name == "UpdateAsync" and target == "https://msftdmsws.accenture.com/MSDMSWS/PRTWebService/UpdateDocument.asmx" and timestamp > ago(15m)
| summarize Success = sumif(itemCount, success == true), Failed = sumif(itemCount, success == false)
| project FailurePercentage = todouble(Failed) * 100 / todouble(Success + Failed)

criteriaDetails.query:
dependencies
| where customDimensions.Origin == "DMSUploadService" and name == "UpdateAsync" and target == "https://msftdmsws.accenture.com/MSDMSWS/PRTWebService/UpdateDocument.asmx" and timestamp > ago(15m)
| summarize Success = sumif(itemCount, success == true), Failed = sumif(itemCount, success == false)
| project FailurePercentage = todouble(Failed) * 100 / todouble(Success + Failed)

alerts.name: [concat('[','UIAPI] Request Reliability Less than SLA')]
alerts.description: This alert will fire when the below query returns 100, indicating that all Dependency events are success == false over the last 15 minutes. This means that Upload Document request and response are not matching.

criteriaDetails.query:
customEvents
| where name startswith "Upload Document request and response are not matching."
| where timestamp > ago(15m)
| order by timestamp desc
|

alerts.name: [concat('[','CompanyConfigurationService] Request Reliability Less than SLA')]
alerts.description: This alert rule will fire when the average Reliability (SuccessRate) is less than or equal to 99.99%, specifically for 500 series result codes

criteriaDetails.query:
requests
| where timestamp > ago(15m) and customDimensions.Origin == "CompanyConfigurationService"
| summarize TotalCount= count(), 5xxCount = countif(toint(resultCode) between (500 .. 599)) by cloud_RoleName
| extend Reliability = (1 - (todouble(5xxCount) / todouble(TotalCount))) * 100

alerts.name: [concat('[','DMSUploadService] Accenture DMS Web Service Dependency Reliability Below Baseline')]
alerts.description:
This alert will fire when DMS Web Service reliability drops below 99.99%. This is tracked via Dependency telemetry events from the DMSUploadService. https://microsoft.sharepoint.com/teams/MicrosoftInvoiceCentral/_layouts/OneNote.aspx?id=%2Fteams%2FMicrosoftInvoiceCentral%2FSiteAssets%2FMicrosoft%20Invoice%20Central%20Notebook&wd=target%28Production%2FDRI-Readiness%2FDRI-TSG.one%7C24A2422B-2DF1-4EA3-9EAA-36BE87E9057F%2F%5BDMSUploadService%5D%20Accenture%20DMS%20Web%20Service%20Dependency%20Reliability%20Below%20Baseline%7CA3A7B88B-B9F2-4AB3-BD31-EFE00F635922%2F%29
onenote:https://microsoft.sharepoint.com/teams/MicrosoftInvoiceCentral/SiteAssets/Microsoft%20Invoice%20Central%20Notebook/Production/DRI-Readiness/DRI-TSG.one#%5bDMSUploadService%5d%20Accenture%20DMS%20Web%20Service%20Dependency%20Reliability%20Below%20Baseline&section-id={24A2422B-2DF1-4EA3-9EAA-36BE87E9057F}&page-id={A3A7B88B-B9F2-4AB3-BD31-EFE00F635922}&end

criteriaDetails.query:
dependencies
| where customDimensions.Origin == "DMSUploadService"
    and name == "UpdateAsync"
    and target == "https://msftdmsws.accenture.com/MSDMSWS/PRTWebService/UpdateDocument.asmx"
    and timestamp > ago(5m)
| summarize
    Success = sumif(itemCount, success == true),
    Failed = sumif(itemCount, success == false)
    by client_StateOrProvince
    | where Failed >5
| project
    SuccessPercentage = todouble(Success) * 100 / todouble(Success + Failed),
    client_StateOrProvince

alerts.name: [concat('[','DocumentService] Request Reliability Less than SLA')]
alerts.description: This alert rule will fire when the average Reliability (SuccessRate) is less than or equal to 99.99%, specifically for 500 series result codes

criteriaDetails.query:
requests
| where timestamp > ago(15m) and customDimensions.Origin == "DocumentService"
| summarize TotalCount= count(), 5xxCount = countif(toint(resultCode) between (500 .. 599)) by cloud_RoleName
| where 5xxCount >10
| extend Reliability = (1 - (todouble(5xxCount) / todouble(TotalCount))) * 100

alerts.name: [concat('[','GovernmentClearanceService] Request Reliability Less than Baseline')]
alerts.description: This alert rule will fire when GovernmentClearanceService is reporting Requests failures greater than 60

criteriaDetails.query:
requests
| where timestamp > ago(15m) and customDimensions.Origin == "GovernmentClearanceService"
| summarize TotalCount= count(), 5xxCount = countif(toint(resultCode) between (500 .. 599)) by cloud_RoleName
| extend reliability = (1 - (todouble(5xxCount) / todouble(TotalCount))) * 100

alerts.name: [concat('[','InvoiceService] CosmosDB Dependency Reliability Less than SLA')]
alerts.description:
This Alert Rule will fire when the success rate of Cosmos dependency calls drops below 99.99%. https://microsoft.sharepoint.com/teams/MicrosoftInvoiceCentral/_layouts/OneNote.aspx?id=%2Fteams%2FMicrosoftInvoiceCentral%2FSiteAssets%2FMicrosoft%20Invoice%20Central%20Notebook&wd=target%28Production%2FDRI-Readiness%2FDRI-TSG.one%7C24A2422B-2DF1-4EA3-9EAA-36BE87E9057F%2F%5BInvoiceService%5D%20CosmosDB%20Dependency%20Reliability%20Less%20than%20SLA%7C13142F18-D5F9-4943-A4B6-75CF58ADE23C%2F%29
onenote:https://microsoft.sharepoint.com/teams/MicrosoftInvoiceCentral/SiteAssets/Microsoft%20Invoice%20Central%20Notebook/Production/DRI-Readiness/DRI-TSG.one#%5bInvoiceService%5d%20CosmosDB%20Dependency%20Reliability%20Less%20than%20SLA&section-id={24A2422B-2DF1-4EA3-9EAA-36BE87E9057F}&page-id={13142F18-D5F9-4943-A4B6-75CF58ADE23C}&end

criteriaDetails.query:
dependencies
| where customDimensions.Origin == "InvoiceService"    
    and (['type'] == "Azure DocumentDB" or ['type'] == "Cosmos") 
    and timestamp > ago(15m)    
| summarize
    Success = sumif(itemCount, success == true),
    Failed = sumif(itemCount, success == false and resultCode != 404 and resultCode != "Canceled")
    by cloud_RoleName
    | where Failed >5
| project    
    Reliability = todouble(Success) * 100 / todouble(Success + Failed),
    cloud_RoleName

alerts.name: [concat('[','InvoiceService] Request Reliability Less than SLA')]
alerts.description: This alert rule will fire when the average Reliability (SuccessRate) is less than or equal to 99%, specifically for 500 series result codes

criteriaDetails.query:
requests
| where timestamp > ago(15m) and customDimensions.Origin == "InvoiceService"
| summarize TotalCount= count(), 5xxCount = countif(toint(resultCode) between (500 .. 599)) by cloud_RoleName
| where 5xxCount >10
| extend Reliability = (1 - (todouble(5xxCount) / todouble(TotalCount))) * 100

dependencies

alerts.description:
This Alert Rule will fire when the success rate of SAP dependency calls drops below 99.99%. https://microsoft.sharepoint.com/teams/MicrosoftInvoiceCentral/_layouts/OneNote.aspx?id=%2Fteams%2FMicrosoftInvoiceCentral%2FSiteAssets%2FMicrosoft%20Invoice%20Central%20Notebook&wd=target%28Production%2FDRI-Readiness%2FDRI-TSG.one%7C24A2422B-2DF1-4EA3-9EAA-36BE87E9057F%2F%5BInvoiceSyncService%5D%20SAP%20Dependency%20Reliability%20Less%20than%20SLA%7C860C7389-9C11-48E8-9EDB-A2140C7480CD%2F%29

alerts.name: [concat('[','InvoiceSyncService] SQL Dependency Reliability Less than SLA')]
alerts.description:
This Alert Rule will fire when the success rate of SQL dependency calls drops below 99.99%. https://microsoft.sharepoint.com/teams/MicrosoftInvoiceCentral/_layouts/OneNote.aspx?id=%2Fteams%2FMicrosoftInvoiceCentral%2FSiteAssets%2FMicrosoft%20Invoice%20Central%20Notebook&wd=target%28Production%2FDRI-Readiness%2FDRI-TSG.one%7C24A2422B-2DF1-4EA3-9EAA-36BE87E9057F%2F%5BInvoiceSyncService%5D%20SQL%20Dependency%20Reliability%20Less%20than%20SLA%7CEE74D8A8-5797-402B-93EF-A1ADBEA0F319%2F%29
onenote:https://microsoft.sharepoint.com/teams/MicrosoftInvoiceCentral/SiteAssets/Microsoft%20Invoice%20Central%20Notebook/Production/DRI-Readiness/DRI-TSG.one#%5bInvoiceSyncService%5d%20SQL%20Dependency%20Reliability%20Less%20than%20SLA&section-id={24A2422B-2DF1-4EA3-9EAA-36BE87E9057F}&page-id={EE74D8A8-5797-402B-93EF-A1ADBEA0F319}&end

criteriaDetails.query:
dependencies
| where customDimensions.Origin == "InvoiceSyncService"
    and ['type'] == "SQL Database"
    and timestamp > ago(15m)
| summarize
    Success = sumif(itemCount, success == true),
    Failed = sumif(itemCount, success == false)
    by client_StateOrProvince
    | where Failed > 10
| project    
    Reliability = todouble(Success) * 100 / todouble(Success + Failed),
    client_StateOrProvince

alerts.name: [concat('[','Microsoft Invoice Central UI] Page Load Time Percentile Greater than SLA')]
alerts.description:
This alert rule will fire when the configured Percentile (50, 75, 90, 99.9, 99.99, etc) for Browser Timing is greater than the threshold (8500ms). https://microsoft.sharepoint.com/teams/MicrosoftInvoiceCentral/_layouts/OneNote.aspx?id=%2Fteams%2FMicrosoftInvoiceCentral%2FSiteAssets%2FMicrosoft%20Invoice%20Central%20Notebook&wd=target%28Production%2FDRI-Readiness%2FDRI-TSG.one%7C24A2422B-2DF1-4EA3-9EAA-36BE87E9057F%2F%5BMicrosoft%20Invoice%20Central%20UI%5D%20Page%20Load%20Time%20Percentile%20Greater%7C569A54F2-CA24-4713-A886-4A907774CFAF%2F%29
onenote:https://microsoft.sharepoint.com/teams/MicrosoftInvoiceCentral/SiteAssets/Microsoft%20Invoice%20Central%20Notebook/Production/DRI-Readiness/DRI-TSG.one#%5bMicrosoft%20Invoice%20Central%20UI%5d%20Page%20Load%20Time%20Percentile%20Greater&section-id={24A2422B-2DF1-4EA3-9EAA-36BE87E9057F}&page-id={569A54F2-CA24-4713-A886-4A907774CFAF}&end

criteriaDetails.query:
let Users = union isfuzzy=true
    availabilityResults,
    requests,
    exceptions,
    pageViews,
    traces,
    customEvents,
    dependencies
| where * matches regex '@.*.*'
| where operation_Name <> ''
| where name == 'Microsoft Invoice Central'
| extend EmailAddress=toupper(user_Id)
| where EmailAddress <>'';
let UserCount =Users
|summarize userCount=dcount(EmailAddress)
| extend id=1;
let Latency = browserTimings 
| summarize percentiles(totalDuration, 50, 75, 90, 99, 99.9, 99.99)  by name
| extend id=1;
UserCount
| join Latency on $left.id==$right.id
| where userCount >5

alerts.name: [concat('[','PartnerApiService] Payment Service Dependency Reliability Less than SLA')]
alerts.description:
This Alert Rule will fire when the success rate of Payment Service dependency calls drops below 99.99% 
Also review the number of failures that happened during that period of time

criteriaDetails.query:
dependencies
| where customDimensions.Origin == "InvoiceV1WebService"
    and target contains "https://paymentgateway.trafficmanager.net"
    and timestamp > ago(15m)
| summarize
    Success = sumif(itemCount, success == true),
    Failed = sumif(itemCount, success == false)
    by client_CountryOrRegion
    | where Failed >10   
| project    
    Reliability = todouble(Success) * 100 / todouble(Success + Failed),
    client_CountryOrRegion

alerts.description: This alert rule will fire when the average Reliability (SuccessRate) is less than or equal to 99.99%, specifically for 500 series result codes

criteriaDetails.query:
requests
| where timestamp > ago(15m) and customDimensions.Origin == "InvoiceV1WebService"

alerts.name: [concat('[','SupplierWeb APIM] Invoices Request Reliability Less than SLA')]
alerts.description:
This alert rule will fire when the average Reliability (SuccessRate) is less than or equal to 99%, specifically for 500 series result codes.  https://microsoft.sharepoint.com/teams/MicrosoftInvoiceCentral/_layouts/OneNote.aspx?id=%2Fteams%2FMicrosoftInvoiceCentral%2FSiteAssets%2FMicrosoft%20Invoice%20Central%20Notebook&wd=target%28Production%2FDRI-Readiness%2FDRI-TSG.one%7C24A2422B-2DF1-4EA3-9EAA-36BE87E9057F%2F%5BSupplierWeb%20APIM%5D%20Invoices%20Request%20Reliability%20Less%20than%20SLA%7C245BACE5-824C-4BD8-AB1A-3CEABA9F9314%2F%29
onenote:https://microsoft.sharepoint.com/teams/MicrosoftInvoiceCentral/SiteAssets/Microsoft%20Invoice%20Central%20Notebook/Production/DRI-Readiness/DRI-TSG.one#%5bSupplierWeb%20APIM%5d%20Invoices%20Request%20Reliability%20Less%20than%20SLA&section-id={24A2422B-2DF1-4EA3-9EAA-36BE87E9057F}&page-id={245BACE5-824C-4BD8-AB1A-3CEABA9F9314}&end

requests
| where timestamp > ago(15m) and url contains "https://supplier.azure-api.net" and name contains "invoices"
| summarize TotalCount= count(), 5xxCount = countif(toint(resultCode) between (500 .. 599))
| where 5xxCount >5
| extend Reliability = (1 - (todouble(5xxCount) / todouble(TotalCount))) * 100

alerts.name: [concat('[','UIAPI] Request Reliability Less than SLA')]
alerts.description:
This alert rule will fire when the average Reliability (SuccessRate) is less than or equal to 98%, specifically for 500 series result codes. https://microsoft.sharepoint.com/teams/MicrosoftInvoiceCentral/_layouts/OneNote.aspx?id=%2Fteams%2FMicrosoftInvoiceCentral%2FSiteAssets%2FMicrosoft%20Invoice%20Central%20Notebook&wd=target%28Production%2FDRI-Readiness%2FDRI-TSG.one%7C24A2422B-2DF1-4EA3-9EAA-36BE87E9057F%2F%5BUIAPI%5D%20Request%20Reliability%20Less%20than%20SLA%7C20934193-1CC6-4200-A11D-2DB298909EBB%2F%29
onenote:https://microsoft.sharepoint.com/teams/MicrosoftInvoiceCentral/SiteAssets/Microsoft%20Invoice%20Central%20Notebook/Production/DRI-Readiness/DRI-TSG.one#%5bUIAPI%5d%20Request%20Reliability%20Less%20than%20SLA&section-id={24A2422B-2DF1-4EA3-9EAA-36BE87E9057F}&page-id={20934193-1CC6-4200-A11D-2DB298909EBB}&end

criteriaDetails.query:
requests
| where timestamp > ago(15m) and customDimensions.Origin == "UIAPI"
| summarize TotalCount= count(), 5xxCount = countif(toint(resultCode) between (500 .. 599)) by cloud_RoleInstance
| where 5xxCount >10
| extend Reliability = (1 - (todouble(5xxCount) / todouble(TotalCount))) * 100

alerts.name: [concat('[','UIAPI] SAP Dependency Reliability Below Baseline')]
alerts.description: This alert will fire when SAP reliability drops below 90%. This is tracked via Dependency telemetry events from the UIAPI Service.

criteriaDetails.query:
dependencies
| where customDimensions.Origin == "UIAPI"
    and target contains "sapprdws.trafficmanager.net"
    and timestamp > ago(15m)
| summarize
    Success = sumif(itemCount, success == true),
    Failed = sumif(itemCount, success == false)
    by cloud_RoleInstance
    | where Failed >5
| project
    Reliability = todouble(Success) * 100 / todouble(Success + Failed), cloud_RoleInstance

alerts.name: [concat('[','Web VMSS] CPU Greater than or Equal to 90 Percent')]
alerts.description:
This alert will fire when any Web VM has a higher than 90% CPU over the last 5 minutes. Please refer to the following OneNote page:  https://microsoft.sharepoint.com/teams/MicrosoftInvoiceCentral/_layouts/OneNote.aspx?id=%2Fteams%2FMicrosoftInvoiceCentral%2FSiteAssets%2FMicrosoft%20Invoice%20Central%20Notebook&wd=target%28Production%2FDRI-Readiness%2FDRI-TSG.one%7C24A2422B-2DF1-4EA3-9EAA-36BE87E9057F%2F%5BWeb%20VMSS%5D%20CPU%20Greater%20than%20or%20Equal%20to%2090%7C89A0FB85-2093-4CBE-B9F9-78A2CA3C1AD4%2F%29
onenote:https://microsoft.sharepoint.com/teams/MicrosoftInvoiceCentral/SiteAssets/Microsoft%20Invoice%20Central%20Notebook/Production/DRI-Readiness/DRI-TSG.one#%5bWeb%20VMSS%5d%20CPU%20Greater%20than%20or%20Equal%20to%2090&section-id={24A2422B-2DF1-4EA3-9EAA-36BE87E9057F}&page-id={89A0FB85-2093-4CBE-B9F9-78A2CA3C1AD4}&end

criteriaDetails.query:
performanceCounters 
| where cloud_RoleInstance contains "Web00000" and counter == "% Processor Time" and category == "Processor" and timestamp > ago (5m)
| summarize avg(value) by cloud_RoleInstance, client_CountryOrRegion

alerts.name: Classic-DMSVendorFeedtoSharepointError
alerts.description: Verify the sql job that runs in AZINVPRDSGSQL1 has successfully updated the 4 files to sharepoint https://sharepoint.partners.extranet.microsoft.com/sites/CPGCommon/One%20Finance%20Feeds/Forms/AllItems.aspx#InplviewHashd4f6a23d-bc75-4ba3-861b-98bb581bb594=SortField%3DModified-SortDir%3DAsc

criteriaDetails.query:
exceptions
| where customDimensions.application == "VendorFeed.exe"

alerts.name: Failures in SAP Parked Doc Report Windows Service
alerts.description: Classic Park Report failing

criteriaDetails.query:
traces
| where customDimensions.Origin == "InvoiceSAPSyncDbWindowsService"
| where severityLevel == 3

alerts.name: Invoice Service - Excessive Service Bus exceptions
alerts.description: Excessive Azure Service Bus exceptions detected in the Invoice Service. This is likely due to service misconfiguration or an Azure Service Bus service outage.

criteriaDetails.query:
exceptions
| where customDimensions["Origin"] in ("InvoiceService")
| where assembly startswith "Microsoft.Azure.ServiceBus"

alerts.name: ModernSonarFailures
alerts.description: This happens when 75 of the submission to Sonar are bad, exception or inconclusive

criteriaDetails.query:
customEvents
| where (name == 'StateSaved' and tostring(customDimensions['Origin']) == 'SonarActorService') and (tostring(customDimensions['ThreatDetectionOutcome']) == "Bad" or tostring (customDimensions['ThreatDetectionOutcome']) == "Good" or tostring(customDimensions['ThreatDetectionOutcome']) == "Exception" or tostring (customDimensions['ThreatDetectionOutcome']) == "Inconclusive") and timestamp > ago(1h)
| summarize Exception = count(tostring(customDimensions['ThreatDetectionOutcome']) == "Exception"), Bad = count(tostring(customDimensions['ThreatDetectionOutcome']) == "Bad"), Good = count(tostring(customDimensions['ThreatDetectionOutcome']) == "Good"), Inconclusive = count(tostring(customDimensions['ThreatDetectionOutcome']) == "Inconclusive") by bin(timestamp, 1h), client_StateOrProvince
| where (Bad + Exception + Inconclusive + Good) > 10
| where (((Bad + Exception + Inconclusive) * 100)/(Bad + Exception + Inconclusive + Good)) > 75

alerts.name: MSInvoiceEndPointUnavailable
alerts.description:
One or more of our MSInvoice endpoints is Offline. Please look at the logs below to identify which URL is offline

When URL = https://einvoice.microsoft.com do: IISRESET and flush the cache in the iis servers

criteriaDetails.query:
availabilityResults
                  | where success != 1
                  | where customDimensions.Category <> "Function.PurchaseOrderServiceHeartbeat"
                  | where customDimensions.Category <> "Function.CompanyConfigurationHeartbeat"
                  | summarize Count = count() by location
                  | where (location has "Asia" and Count > 0)
                   or (location has "US" and Count > 0)
                   or (location !contains "Asia" and location !contains "US" and Count >= 3)

alerts.name: MSInvoicePegasoFailures
alerts.description: MS Invoice is failing to call Pegaso to validate Mexican invoices (company code 2232, and 1088)

criteriaDetails.query:
exceptions
| where customDimensions.Origin == "ApprovalService"
| where customDimensions.handler == "ThreeWayAutoApprovalHandler"
| where details contains 'Pegaso'

alerts.name: OCRRequestFailedtoWriteToDB
alerts.description: This Alert will be triggered when an OCR request is not written to the Database. We need to manually resubmit this request.

criteriaDetails.query:
let SuccessRequest= requests 
| where name == "Microsoft.Finance.Invoice.Web.Service.V1.Controllers.Invoices.Ocr.InvoicesController.CreateAsync (Microsoft.Finance.Invoice.Web.Service)"  
| where success == "True"  
| where timestamp  < ago(6h)  and timestamp  > ago(7d) 
| project operation_Id 
| distinct operation_Id; 
SuccessRequest 
| join kind= leftanti 
(customEvents 
| where name == "OCRSQLRequest" 
| project CorrelationId =tostring(customDimensions.CorrelationId) 
)
on $left.operation_Id == $right.CorrelationId

alerts.name: Purchase-Classifications-Not-Found-Redis-Cache-Is-Empty
alerts.description:
This alert will be triggered if the Purchase classification cannot be found in the Redis cache. 

Action plan:
1. Check if the PDS job is running successfully
2. Check PDS logs

See OneNote section: Purchase-Classifications-Not-Found-Redis-Cache-Is-Empty

criteriaDetails.query:
exceptions
| where type == "System.Collections.Generic.KeyNotFoundException"
| where outerMessage contains "Key PurchaseClassification"

alerts.name: SAP dependency failures api-Assets-CreateShellPurchase
alerts.description: This alert will fire when SAP dependency fails while consuming the api-Assets-CreateShellPurchase

criteriaDetails.query:
dependencies
| where data startswith "https://sapwsprd.microsoft.com/MSCPGINVOICELIB/api/Assets/CreateShellPurchase"
| where success == false

alerts.name: SAP dependency failures api-Invoice-GetInvoiceDetails
alerts.description: This alert will fire when SAP dependency fails while consuming the api-Invoice-GetInvoiceDetails

criteriaDetails.query:
dependencies
| where data startswith "https://sapwsprd.microsoft.com/MSCPGINVOICELIB/api/Invoice/GetInvoiceDetails"
| where success == false

| where data startswith "https://sapwsprd.microsoft.com/MSCPGINVOICELIB/api/Invoices/ByPurchaseOrders"
| where success == false

alerts.description: This alert will fire when SAP dependency fails while consuming the api-Invoices-Update

alerts.name: SAPConnectionFailures500s
alerts.description: This alert is triggered when there are connectivity issues with SAP API

criteriaDetails.query:
exceptions
| where details has "Failed to connect to the SAP Server"

alerts.name: Server 500 Error Notification Alert
alerts.description: Request throwing error with 500 result code

criteriaDetails.query:
requests
| where resultCode == "500"
| where timestamp > ago(15min)

alerts.name: Shipping validation failure
alerts.description: The shipping validation api is throwing a null reference exception

criteriaDetails.query:
exceptions
| where problemId contains "System.NullReferenceException"
| where innermostAssembly contains "UIAPI"
| where operation_Name contains "GetHeaderSectionForPurchaseOrderDocumentCreation"
| where timestamp > ago(30m)

alerts.name: SubmitInvoiceRequestFailures
alerts.description: There are failures between the UIAPI and the intake service when calculating tax and/or submitting the invoice.

criteriaDetails.query: dependencies | where name == "Submit-Invoice-Request" or name == "Query-Tax" | where success == false | extend StatusCode = tostring(parse_json(resultCode).["HTTP-Status-Code"]) | where StatusCode != "400"

alerts.name: TiP - Classic Synthetic Login Test Failures - Greater Than or Equal to 3 - Last 15 Minutes
alerts.description:
Please see the below OneNote page for this alert.

https://microsoft.sharepoint.com/teams/MicrosoftInvoiceCentral/_layouts/OneNote.aspx?id=%2Fteams%2FMicrosoftInvoiceCentral%2FSiteAssets%2FMicrosoft%20Invoice%20Central%20Notebook&wd=target%28Production%2FDRI-Readiness%2FDRI-TSG.one%7C24A2422B-2DF1-4EA3-9EAA-36BE87E9057F%2FTiP%20-%20Synthetic%20Login%20Test%20Failures%20-%20Greater%20Than%20or%7C5C921A41-632A-464C-B908-CB4F73325F76%2F%29

criteriaDetails.query:
customEvents
| where name == "MonitoredTestCompleted" and customDimensions.FullyQualifiedTestClassName == "Microsoft.Finance.Invoice.TiP.UI.Tests.Classic.LoginTests" and customDimensions.Outcome == "Failed" and customDimensions.BuildId != "local" and timestamp > ago(15m)

alerts.name: MEO Notification failure
alerts.description:
This alert is triggered due to MEO notification failure and raised incident with sev4. 
Please refer to the following OneNote page: https://microsoft.sharepoint.com/teams/MicrosoftInvoiceCentral/_layouts/OneNote.aspx?id=%2Fteams%2FMicrosoftInvoiceCentral%2FSiteAssets%2FMicrosoft%20Invoice%20Central%20Notebook&wd=target%28Production%2FDRI-Readiness%2FDRI-TSG.one%7C24A2422B-2DF1-4EA3-9EAA-36BE87E9057F%2FNotification%20Service%20-%20DRI%20Guide%7C7D83023A-D800-470B-8A1F-97BC40979FCF%2F%29

criteriaDetails.query:
traces
| union exceptions
| where (customDimensions.Origin == "NotificationService" and customDimensions.Status == "Failed") or(customDimensions.Category contains "GetMeoEmailStatusAndRetry" and (customDimensions.ResponseContent == "Failed" or customDimensions.LogLevel == "Error" ))

alerts.name: EUA Service call failed
alerts.description: This alerts when API service call to to EUA fails.

criteriaDetails.query:
dependencies
| where customDimensions.Origin == "AuthorizationManagementService"
| where target contains "https://euaaccesssupplierservice"
| summarize
Success = sumif(itemCount, success == true),
Failed = sumif(itemCount, success == false)
by client_StateOrProvince
| where Failed > 5
| project
Reliability = todouble(Success) * 100 / todouble(Success + Failed),
client_StateOrProvince

alerts.name: SLM compliance block response true
alerts.description: This alerts when SLM Compliance block response is true

criteriaDetails.query:
customEvents
| where customDimensions.FeatureName == "Compliance Block"
| where name == "Response from SLM"
| extend SupplierId_ = tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(tostring(customDimensions.ResponseBody)).Data)).SupplierId)
| extend ComplianceBlock = tostring(customDimensions.ComplianceBlock)
| where customDimensions.ComplianceBlock == "True"

alerts.name: Failed Metadata-Get Tax Alert
alerts.description: This alert when there are tax exceptions in modern supplier UI

criteriaDetails.query:
union isfuzzy=true exceptions
| extend message_ = tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(tostring(parse_json(tostring(customDimensions.Response))[0].errors)).overall))[0].message)
| where customDimensions["Origin"] in ("UI") and problemId !contains ("ErrorEvent: Script error.")
| where type contains "Metadata - Get Tax"
| where message_ contains "Object reference not set to an instance of an object"
| where timestamp > ago(1h)
| distinct tostring(customDimensions.XCV)

alerts.name: Purchase Classification Returns no Response
alerts.description: Trigger an alert when purchase classification returns no response.

criteriaDetails.query:
union isfuzzy=true dependencies
| where timestamp > ago(24h)
| where customDimensions["Origin"] in ("InvoiceService")
| where target == "https://procurementdataservices.azurewebsites.net/"
| order by timestamp desc
| extend classificationId = customDimensions.classificationId
| extend ResultCount = tostring(parse_json(tostring(customDimensions.ReturnResult)).Count) | where ResultCount == "0"

alerts.name: Certificate Cannot Be Loaded
alerts.description: This alert is raised when an application is not able to load a certificate. We usually see when the service fabric cluster is patched and the old encryption cert is deleted as part of reimage.  Check the parameter files in web to identify the thumbprint of this cert encrypt-web-invoice-microsoft-com so you can reinstall it in each web vm.

criteriaDetails.query:
union isfuzzy=true exceptions
| where timestamp > ago(15m)
| where * has "\'certificate\'"
    and * has "cannot"
    and * has "be"
    and * has "a"
    and * has "\'null\'"
| order by timestamp desc

alerts.name: [UIAPI]DocumentFailedToSave
alerts.description: The uploaded document from UI has invalid fileId or Stream. Please check logs for more details.

criteriaDetails.query:
exceptions
| order by timestamp desc
| where outerType == "System.InvalidOperationException"
| where outerMessage == "fileId must be initialized" or outerMessage =="Cannot save a null file stream"

alerts.name: [Document] CosmosDB throwing Exceptions
alerts.description: This alert is triggered when there are connectivity issues with Document CosmosDB. Check if the container failed over if the write region is down and no multi regional write enabled on the container.

criteriaDetails.query:
exceptions
| where * has "cosmos-invoicecentral-document-prod"
| order by timestamp desc
